title: change output always goes to default_address — breaks transaction unlinkability
description: build_shielded_tx step 10 calls sk.default_address() for every change output. All change across all transactions from the same account goes to the same address. An observer can link all transactions that receive change to one wallet — this breaks shielded unlinkability and violates the privacy model explicitly called out in CLAUDE.md §Fresh subaddress per payment. Fix: use sk.to_dfvk().find_address(diversifier_index) with a per-tx or DB-tracked diversifier index.
close_reason: build_shielded_tx now takes change_diversifier_index: u128; change output uses sk.to_dfvk().find_address(change_diversifier_index) instead of default_address()
